---
title: "08b_paper_style_figures"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages and saved outputs
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(readr)

dir.create(here("outputs"), showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "figures"), showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "tables"), showWarnings = FALSE)

expression_rf_varimp <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_rf_top_features.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

methylation_rf_varimp <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_rf_top_features.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

clinical_rf_varimp <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "clinical_rf_varimp.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

final_model_comparison <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "final_model_comparison_extended.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

model_data_methylation_only <- read_rds(
  here("data", "processed", "model_data_methylation_only.rds")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Figure 1: faceted feature-importance plot
#    Inspired by paper-style Gini importance panels
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_imp_plot <- expression_rf_varimp %>%
  slice_head(n = 12) %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Expression")

meth_imp_plot <- methylation_rf_varimp %>%
  slice_head(n = 12) %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Methylation")

clinical_imp_plot <- clinical_rf_varimp %>%
  slice_head(n = 12) %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Clinical")

all_imp_plot <- bind_rows(
  expr_imp_plot,
  meth_imp_plot,
  clinical_imp_plot
) %>%
  group_by(data_source) %>%
  mutate(feature = factor(feature, levels = rev(feature))) %>%
  ungroup()

p_importance_facets <- ggplot(all_imp_plot, aes(x = Overall, y = feature)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ data_source, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Top random forest features across data sources",
    x = "Variable importance",
    y = NULL
  )

print(p_importance_facets)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "faceted_feature_importance.png"),
  plot = p_importance_facets,
  width = 12,
  height = 5
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Figure 2: benchmark metrics grouped bar chart
#    Inspired by benchmark-metric panels from the paper
#--------------------------------------------------

best_metrics <- final_model_comparison %>%
  filter(
    (data_source == "Clinical" & model == "RandomForest") |
      (data_source == "Expression" & model == "RandomForest") |
      (data_source == "Methylation" & model == "RandomForest") |
      (data_source == "Multiomic" & model == "RandomForest")
  ) %>%
  select(data_source, model, auc, Sens, Spec) %>%
  rename(
    AUC = auc,
    Sensitivity = Sens,
    Specificity = Spec
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(AUC, Sensitivity, Specificity),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  )

# add late integration as AUC-only
late_integration_metric <- final_model_comparison %>%
  filter(data_source == "Late integration") %>%
  select(data_source, model, auc) %>%
  rename(AUC = auc) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = AUC,
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  )

best_metrics_plot <- bind_rows(
  best_metrics,
  late_integration_metric
) %>%
  mutate(
    data_source = factor(
      data_source,
      levels = c("Clinical", "Expression", "Methylation", "Multiomic", "Late integration")
    )
  )

p_benchmark_metrics <- ggplot(best_metrics_plot, aes(x = metric, y = value, fill = data_source)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Benchmark metrics for the best-performing models",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Value",
    fill = "Data source"
  )

print(p_benchmark_metrics)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "benchmark_metrics_grouped.png"),
  plot = p_benchmark_metrics,
  width = 10,
  height = 5
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Figure 3: methylation beta density curves
#    Inspired by paper-style beta density figures
#--------------------------------------------------

set.seed(123)

# sample a manageable set of methylation features
sampled_beta_features <- methylation_rf_varimp %>%
  slice_head(n = 50) %>%
  pull(feature)

meth_density_df <- model_data_methylation_only %>%
  select(survival_500, all_of(sampled_beta_features)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -survival_500,
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "beta_value"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(beta_value))

p_beta_density <- ggplot(meth_density_df, aes(x = beta_value, group = feature, color = survival_500)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.25) +
  labs(
    title = "Density curves of top methylation beta values by survival group",
    x = "Beta value",
    y = "Density",
    color = "Survived > 500 days"
  )

print(p_beta_density)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "methylation_beta_density_curves.png"),
  plot = p_beta_density,
  width = 10,
  height = 6
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Optional cleaner density version:
#    average density by survival group only
#--------------------------------------------------

set.seed(123)

density_sample_features <- sample(
  methylation_rf_varimp$feature,
  size = min(200, nrow(methylation_rf_varimp))
)

meth_density_simple <- model_data_methylation_only %>%
  select(survival_500, all_of(density_sample_features)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -survival_500,
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "beta_value"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(beta_value))

p_beta_density_simple <- ggplot(meth_density_simple, aes(x = beta_value, color = survival_500)) +
  geom_density() +
  labs(
    title = "Methylation beta-value density by survival group",
    x = "Beta value",
    y = "Density",
    color = "Survived > 500 days"
  )

print(p_beta_density_simple)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "methylation_beta_density_simple.png"),
  plot = p_beta_density_simple,
  width = 8,
  height = 5
)
```
